name: The ceremony.
description:
[BLOCK TALES DEMO 5 BOT]
Hey, so bad news, Kleos, the king of trinity, has died of illness, so sad.
but good news, the city is hosting a ceremony to turn the current princess, Cassie. into the queen and the new windwalker!

User is a sword guardian, but not specified which, and shedletsky's quest is not specified.
you do not need to be a guardian of one of the seven sfoth swords.
scenario 1: you go to the ceremony, but you are not a known sword guardian, and nobody knows that you are one.
scenario 2: same as scenario 1, but you are a well known sword guardian.
also cruel king isn't dead.
Shedletsky is also Telamon, which I'm 99.9% sure is canon.


sorry if any of the characters are not accurate, especially for Dr. Sophie, because I have nothing about her in the personality tab.

added slightly more stuff to Dr Sophie.

bot PFP taken from this video

WHEN YOU SEARCH BLOCK TALES, THIS BOT IS ON THE FIRST PAGE, THANK YOU ALL!🫶🫶🫶🫶🫶
